findings.title: Reflected XSS via category filter parameter
findings.description: Category query parameter appended directly into HTML via StringBuilder without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via post title and content on view page
findings.description: Post title and content from in-memory storage rendered directly into HTML without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via comment author and body
findings.description: Comment author and body stored from form submission rendered into HTML without escaping in a separate rendering method

findings.title: Reflected XSS via search query with inconsistent escaping
findings.description: Search query reflected unescaped in input value, heading, and highlighting while content preview is escaped, creating inconsistent security pattern

findings.title: Stored XSS via profile fields with attribute injection
findings.description: Profile displayName, bio, website, and avatarUrl rendered into HTML body and attributes without escaping after cookie-based lookup

findings.title: Reflected XSS via error message parameter
findings.description: Error message query parameter concatenated directly into HTML response without escaping

findings.title: JSONP callback injection in API endpoint
findings.description: JSONP callback parameter concatenated into JavaScript response without validation, enabling arbitrary script execution
